title: InstanceSettings
content:
# InstanceSettings


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Instance Setting was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Instance Setting.
- **payload** (`object`): The Instance Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Instance Setting being defined.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Instance Settings keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, name, payload, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Instance Setting was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Instance Setting.

payload.description: The Instance Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Instance Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any Instance Settings keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
